creator: jkois@freebsd.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

- -------- Original Message --------
Subject: 	Re: www/152390: Request to add our FreeBSD Mexican Community
to Users Groups
Date: 	Sat, 20 Nov 2010 11:07:21 -0600
From: 	Ing. Ernesto Vázquez <ernesto@freebsd.mx>
To: 	Johann Kois <freebsd@johannkois.at>



Hello,

That community listed is not active anymore, in fact no one answered our
emails so we decided make another community wich is active and grow up
at this time.

That domain is org.mx <http://org.mx>, our domain is .mx

Our information is:

Contact Name: Ernesto Vazquez
Email: ernesto@freebsd.mx <mailto:ernesto@freebsd.mx>
Site: http://freebsd.mx/
Forum: http://freebsd.mx/foro/
Description: The FreeBSD Mexican Community <http://freebsd.mx/> is a
spanish language oriented user group who want to promote and educate
people about BSD Operating Systems making tutorials, events and
conferences. We also are working with all Open Source Unix derivates
like NetBSD, OpenBSD, Linux and others. For more information please
contact Ernesto Vazquez <mailto:ernesto@freebsd.mx>.

Regards.

On Sat, Nov 20, 2010 at 3:27 AM, Johann Kois <freebsd@johannkois.at
<mailto:freebsd@johannkois.at>> wrote:

    Hm,

    seems FreeBSD.mx has been included in the usersgroups list at least
    since 2007 (see http://www.FreeBSD.org/usergroups.html) ...

    Would you like to update this entry?  If yes, please submit your
    changes.  Otherwise I will close this PR.

    Regards.

    jkois

    --
    Johann Kois
    jkois(at)FreeBSD.org
    FreeBSD Documentation Project
    FreeBSD German Documentation Project - https://doc.bsdgroup.de






- -- 
Ernesto Vázquez
http://freebsd.mx/
